# Office Software Marketplace

> Curated directory of 130 enterprise-grade SaaS, automation and AI tools, organized in 5 categories. Last updated 2026-06-15.

Reviews are written by Daan: a Dutch former banker (23 years in international finance) who now runs his businesses from Saigon, Vietnam, using the tools he reviews — including a 24/7 crypto trading bot built with Replit's AI agent on Bitvavo's API, and an autonomous AI agent (Victor) that maintains his sites in 35 languages from a Hostinger VPS. Hands-on reviews reflect real, personal use.

## Decision tools
- [Tool Finder](https://officesoftwaremarketplace.com/finder.html): interactive wizard across the full directory
- [Deals & free trials](https://officesoftwaremarketplace.com/deals.html): current offers for every tool
- [Full directory](https://officesoftwaremarketplace.com/): all tools with category filters
## Deeper reviews
- [AIBuilder Marketplace reviews](https://aibuildermarketplace.com/b2b/): in-depth reviews and comparisons for these tools
